infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tabibok Health needs camera access to allow you to capture and upload medical documents, prescriptions, and identification for your health records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tabibok Health needs photo library access to allow you to upload medical documents, prescriptions, and identification from your device.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tabibok Health uses your location to help you find nearby clinics and doctors.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: This app is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any medical condition. It is a booking and communication platform for healthcare services.
